title: scolymocephalus auriculatus
intro: Scolymocephalus auriculatus, also known as the ear-pod flower or golden ear, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its medicinal properties attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Scolymocephalus auriculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
